message:
fix: standardize warning message capitalization (caam-g5go)

Use 'Warning:' with capital W consistently across all warning messages.

Files updated:
- cmd/caam/cmd/root.go
- cmd/caam/cmd/run.go
- internal/exec/exec.go
- internal/exec/smart_runner.go
- internal/wrap/wrap.go
